<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Routing\Matcher\Dumper; use Symfony\Component\Routing\RouteCollection; /** * MatcherDumperInterface is the interface that all matcher dumper classes must implement. * * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ interface MatcherDumperInterface { /** * Dumps a set of routes to a string representation of executable code * that can then be used to match a request against these routes. */ public function dump(array $options = []): string; /** * Gets the routes to dump. */ public function getRoutes(): RouteCollection; }
